name: spec.read_declared_files
description: Read the current contents of files declared in a scafld 2 markdown spec before bounded fix authoring.

spec_contents.description: Raw scafld 2 markdown spec contents to inspect for declared file paths.

extra_files.description: Additional repo-relative file targets to read, such as repo_snapshot.recommended_files.

repo_root.description: Repository root used to resolve declared file paths.

fixture.description: Optional fixture workspace root used during dev and harness execution.
